description_long: This object consists of a low, rectangular wooden platform surrounded by six flat, rectangular cushions. The platform is dark brown with a smooth, polished finish and stands on four short, sturdy legs. The cushions are deep red with a gold floral or botanical pattern, providing a decorative and comfortable seating arrangement. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional Japanese or Asian-style floor seating, where the platform serves as a table or central surface and the cushions are for sitting. The materials suggest a combination of solid wood for the platform and fabric-covered padding for the cushions. This setup is suitable for communal seating in parks, outdoor plazas, or urban relaxation areas.
description: A dark wooden platform table with six red and gold patterned floor cushions arranged around it, evoking traditional communal seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the long side of the wooden platform with three cushions on each side, highlighting the symmetrical arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the short side of the platform with two cushions on each side, emphasizing the table's rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same cushion arrangement and clear visibility of the platform's legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the short side of the platform and the paired cushions.
